Package com.koralix.commons.serialization

Class ValueSerializer<S,D>

java.lang.Object
com.koralix.commons.serialization.ValueSerializer<S,D>
Type Parameters:
S - the source type
D - the destination type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializer<S,Value<D>>
public class ValueSerializer<S,D> extends Object implements Serializer<S,Value<D>>
A serializer wrapper for values.
See Also:
  • Serializer
  • Value
